text.title: Plausible Analytics Setup Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Plausible Analytics Setup.

example.scenario: Solo Gatsby SaaS with signup + paid conversion goals; co-founder + investor get scoped shared links.
example.trace: site registered → script self-hosted at analytics.example.com → 2 goals declared → 3 custom props (plan, source, country) → 2 shared links
